pilot.name: Blueprint uses Blueprint to sell Blueprint
pilot.paidScaleDecision: No paid spend, influencer spend, or acquisition ads until this ledger records organic replies, hosted-review starts, or qualified calls from the Exact-Site Hosted Review wedge.

blockers.summary: The active pilot has 12 target rows, below the 30-account floor needed before judging the wedge.
blockers.nextAction: Add real robot-team target rows from explicit buying signals while keeping recipient fields empty unless evidence-backed.

blockers.summary: The active pilot has two proof-ready hosted-review artifacts, below the three-artifact scale checkpoint.
blockers.nextAction: Create or attach one more buyer-specific hosted-review artifact from real capture provenance, or keep the capture-ask track explicit until a real artifact exists.

paperclipIssues.title: Exact-Site GTM blocker: target ledger is below 30-account pilot floor
Exact-Site GTM blocker: only two proof-ready hosted-review artifacts before scale

targets.workflowNeed: Inspect a grocery-style public aisle loop before deciding whether a more specific retail capture would be useful.
intentSignals: Company publicly sells retail shelf-intelligence robots that operate in grocery and store aisles.

evidence.summary: Public product positioning indicates a retail-aisle robot workflow where exact-site hosted review could be a relevant first artifact.
evidence.notes: No recipient-backed contact has been recorded yet.

sales.nextAction: Find explicit recipient-backed contact evidence before founder first-send approval.

blockers.summary: Buyer sends and replies cannot be treated as production-durable until sender verification and Gmail human-reply watcher credentials are configured.
